rulings.Case Title: TESHOME T TAREKEGN, VS. FREWWORK ABERRA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 20, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS JORGE BARRIENTOS, WEM PACIFIC INVESTMENT INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: MERINDA KEPHART et al VS. ESTATE OF IMELDA DOLLARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses To Req For Admissions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 20, 2013, line 10. PLAINTIFFS MERINDA KEPHART and CORNELIUS GRAHAM's Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Request For Admissions. Grant and deny in part. Grant admissions re San Francisco Property only. Deny admissions re San Mateo County. Deny Sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK YI VS. ROMERO, BENJAMIN, A/K/A BENJAMIN ROMERO PALMA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 20, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN PALMA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer. Defendant provides no authority re application of San Francisco Rent Oridinance to commercial property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE, VS. JANNIE TAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 20, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANTS JANNIE TAM and RHETT WHITEHILL's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Deny - Amended Demurrer Notice fails to provide grounds for motion. Appointment of receiver and injunctive relief not supported by points and authorities and competent evidence. NB - In the future moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and c. = (501/REQ)
